name: @ssi/contracts-evm
description: EVM (Solidity) smart contracts for the Self-Sovereign Identity platform - Soulbound identity badges + cross-chain bridge stub.

scripts.build: (command -v forge && forge build) || echo 'forge not available, skipping build'
scripts.test: (command -v forge && forge test -vv) || echo 'forge not available, skipping tests'
scripts.lint: (command -v forge && forge fmt --check) || echo 'forge not available, skipping lint'
scripts.fmt: (command -v forge && forge fmt) || echo 'forge not available, skipping fmt'
scripts.coverage: (command -v forge && forge coverage --report summary) || echo 'forge not available, skipping coverage'
